title: Nurse Pouch - Medical Nurse Organizer Pouch, Double Sided, 7 Pockets, Belt

variation_files.prompt: A full-length portrait of a smiling woman with long, wavy blonde hair, wearing light blue medical scrubs, standing against a plain white background. Around her waist, she wears the belt pouch, positioned on her left side, secured by a black adjustable strap with a plastic buckle. The pouch hangs vertically, with its front facing forward, and is shown in use as part of her attire. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting her features and the product naturally, with no shadows or additional props in the scene.
